name: Emkay Global Financial Services Limited
summary: Emkay Global Financial Services Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides stock broking, institutional equities, investment banking, portfolio management, and wealth management services in India. The company offers equity broking, asset management, currency and commodity advisory and broking, trading and investment education, investment management, alternative investment fund, lending, depository participant, wealth and investment advisory, and retail broking services. It also provides investment solutions, such as portfolio creation, investment planning, portfolio monitoring, transactional support, MIS and information support, and advisory services; and estate and succession planning, mutual fund advisory, cash and derivatives brokerage, and equity-based research advisory services, as well as distributes third party financial products. In addition, the company offers equity research, equity capital market, merchant banking, debt advisory, private equity placement, qualified institutional placement, rights issue, and corporate advisory services. It serves institutional investors, mutual funds, hedge funds, banks, insurance companies, private equity firms, corporate houses, small and medium sized enterprises, and high net worth individuals. The company was formerly known as Emkay Share and Stock Brokers Limited and changed its name to Emkay Global Financial Services Limited in June 2008. Emkay Global Financial Services Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Mumbai, India.
